---
title: Community OSS
description: Agent instructions for open-source projects with maintainer trust.
---

Use this for public repos where maintainer trust matters.

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rogerchappel/agentic-team-playbook/main/examples/community-oss-AGENTS.md -o AGENTS.md
```

## Key Rules

- keep PRs small
- split broad diffs before committing
- avoid unrelated formatting churn
- preserve compatibility
- call out public behaviour changes
- do not merge without maintainer approval

## Source

The example lives in [`examples/community-oss-AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/rogerchappel/agentic-team-playbook/blob/main/examples/community-oss-AGENTS.md).
